description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a dark brown, textured cover featuring subtle embossed rectangular patterns along the edges. The book is open, revealing two pages: the left page displays a bold title and author name, while the right page lists works in a simple, serif font. The pages have a slightly aged, off-white appearance with a gradient shadow effect along the bottom. The spine is rounded and matches the cover in color and texture, with no visible text or decoration. The book's overall appearance suggests it is well-crafted and intended for display or reading in a public or personal setting. There are no visible illustrations or publisher logos on the cover or spine.
description: A medium-sized, dark brown hardcover book with embossed cover patterns, open to reveal printed pages with text and no visible illustrations.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing two interior pages with printed text; the left page features a bold title, and the right page lists works.
description_view_1: A side view showing the thickness of the book and the curvature of the open pages, with the cover and some page edges visible.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, displaying a dark brown, textured surface with embossed rectangular border patterns and a rounded spine.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness and the layered appearance of the open pages.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown and rounded, matching the cover, with subtle embossed rectangular patterns but no visible text or decorative elements.
